policy.goal: Root .ts files must be explicit public entrypoints or temporary compatibility shims; non-public tooling belongs in bin/ or src/.

entries.reason: Root gate remains only as a compatibility entry while the package bin and npm script route through the src CLI.
Root learn is now a compatibility CLI shim while the implementation lives under runtime learning.
Root prompt remains only as a compatibility entry while bin/yolo-prompt routes through the src CLI.
Runner root is a thin compatibility entry over the src runtime core and is kept as the known manual entrypoint.
Package root export is intentionally a root SDK facade for Node package compatibility.
Root session-memory is now a compatibility CLI shim while the implementation lives under runtime evidence.
Root state-snapshot is now a compatibility CLI shim while the implementation lives under runtime evidence.
Root task-logger is now a compatibility import shim while the implementation lives under runtime logging.
